title: Just Winter
description: Escape into a winter wonderland. A cozy survival modpack focused on building, farming, and staying warm with immersive decorations and snowy aesthetics.
body:
❄️ Welcome to a Frozen Wonderland! ❄️

Prepare your winter coat and grab a mug of hot cocoa! ☕ This modpack transforms Minecraft into a beautiful, snowy world where survival is all about staying warm and cozy.

Features:

🏠 Build Your Dream Cabin: Use hundreds of new furniture pieces and decorations (Handcrafted, Macaw's) to create the perfect rustic home.

🌨️ Immersive Winter: Experience realistic seasons and snowy weather that makes returning to your warm fireplace feel amazing.

🍲 Culinary Delights: Master the art of cooking with Farmer's Delight. Prepare hot stews and teas to keep the cold away.

⚙️ Cozy Automation: Use the power of Create to automate your chores, so you can spend more time decorating.

🐉 Exploration: Venture out into the cold to find dragons and dungeons, then return to the safety of your home.

Grab your blanket, it's time to get cozy! 🕯️✨
